commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer handling is the right lane because this protected maintainer PR intentionally changes upgrade behavior and needs live macOS LaunchAgent validation rather than an automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff adds fixed-argument process inspection plus tests/changelog only; it does not touch secrets, dependencies, lockfiles, CI, publishing, or permission broadening. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds macOS `ps`-based transitive parent-PID walking to the stale-gateway ancestry guard, threads caller timeouts into that lookup, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main macOS repro was run in this read-only review. Source inspection plus the linked issue logs give a credible path: current main stops macOS ancestry at `process.ppid`, so a nested gateway-owned updater can miss the gateway PID and reach managed-service stop.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer handling is the right lane because this protected maintainer PR intentionally changes upgrade behavior and needs live macOS LaunchAgent validation rather than an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(update): detect nested macOS gateway ancestry
target.body:
## Summary

- Walk the macOS process parent chain with `ps` so nested updater children inherit the existing gateway-ancestry block before package updates stop the managed Gateway service.
- Thread the caller spawn timeout through macOS ancestry probes so restart polling keeps its 400ms probe budget.
- Add regression coverage for the nested macOS updater path, timeout plumbing, and the changelog entry.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/85120.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs CHANGELOG.md src/infra/restart-stale-pids.ts src/infra/restart-stale-pids.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md src/infra/restart-stale-pids.ts src/infra/restart-stale-pids.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart-stale-pids.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts -- -t "ancestor|gateway process tree|managed gateway service|poll timeout|caller timeout"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart-stale-pids.test.ts`

Blocked validation:

- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm check:changed` could not run here because local pnpm attempted a dependency repair/install before invoking the script. The direct Testbox wrapper path then failed because this shell is not authenticated with Blacksmith (`blacksmith auth login` required).
- Live Crabbox mac proof is blocked in this shell: Crabbox has no coordinator/broker configured, and the configured Hetzner provider has no token.
target.author: vincentkoc
